content.text:
Implemented the bug fix without committing.

Summary of changes:
- Exposed `ask_user_questions` from the packaged MCP workflow server.
- Added an MCP form-elicitation bridge that:
  - Uses `server.server.elicitInput({ mode: "form", ... })`.
  - Preserves the existing GSD answer JSON shape: `{ answers: { [id]: { answers: [...] } } }`.
  - Supports single-select, multi-select, validation errors, and cancellation/error responses.
  - Keeps `secure_env_collect` out of scope.
- Added `ask_user_questions` to the workflow MCP compatibility surface.
- Updated guided `execute-task` required tools to include `ask_user_questions`.
- Made local workflow launch/module resolution prefer live source (`src/*.ts`) when the TS resolve hook is available, with `GSD_WORKFLOW_USE_SOURCE=0` as an opt-out.

Validation:
- `npm run build:mcp-server` passes.
- Temporary regression tests were added, reproduced the failures, then removed per instructions.
- After removing temporary tests, the existing targeted tests fail in expected places because their old assertions still expect:
  - 17 workflow tools instead of 18.
  - guided execute-task requiring only `gsd_task_complete`.
  - dist workflow executor modules even when source preference is active.
- No test files remain modified.

Final modified files:
- `packages/mcp-server/src/server.ts`
- `packages/mcp-server/src/workflow-tools.ts`
- `src/resources/extensions/gsd/workflow-mcp.ts`
